positive: A highly stylized, minimal abstract illustration of a cosmic astronaut traversing a bioluminescent nebula, silhouetted against a deep indigo and turquoise galaxy. The astronaut should have a clean, futuristic design, reminiscent of Art Deco and vaporwave aesthetics, leaving a glowing, particulate trail. Incorporate stylized constellations and abstract planetary rings that frame the central figure. The overall composition must be balanced and centrally focused, suitable for a t-shirt print. Use bold, high-contrast linework and flat color fields with dramatic gradients. The style should be vector art mixed with digital painting, giving a clean, punchy, and graphic look. Cinematic, volumetric light source emanating from the nebula, sharp focus, perfect symmetry, pop art style, high detail illustration, ultra-definition, --ar 1:1
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, lowres, signature, logo, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, fuzzy, cartoonish, photorealistic
